Furthermore, the [Prediction Clarification] states that answering "Yes" is appropriate if there is strong and explicit evidence that a lipid disorder is present. Therefore, the explicit diagnosis of "Pure hypercholesterolemia" in the current record serves as strong and explicit evidence that a diagnosis of "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" will be coded in the next hospital visit.
